name: Playwright Auto-Fix on Failure
description: When Playwright test fails and creates error-context.md, trigger agent to analyze and auto-fix.

then.prompt:
Playwright test just failed. Follow these steps:

1. Read the failure report at [TEST_ROOT]/test-results/failure-report.md (if exists)
2. Read ALL error-context.md files in [TEST_ROOT]/test-results/**/error-context.md
3. Check screenshot files (test-failed-*.png) in the same directories
4. Analyze root cause:
   - UI change in source code? → Fix src/
   - Test selector/assertion outdated? → Fix tests-web/
   - Data change? → Update fixtures/
5. Apply the fix
6. Re-run ONLY the failed test to verify
7. Report results concisely

IMPORTANT: Do NOT modify test expectations to simply pass — fix the actual root cause.
